name: Smoked Turkey Hash
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons high-grade soy sauce or liquid aminos (unfermented soy sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat the bottom of a frying pan with canola oil.
2. Chop the onion and fry over medium heat until translucent.
3. Add all other ingredients to the pan, mix well.
4. Cook over medium heat for 5-10 minutes, or until potatoes are beginning to brown, turning frequently.
5. Remove from heat and serve.
